Name: Operating Checking
Description: Bell Behavioral Health primary operating account - Truist Bank. Used for lease, payroll, and general practice expenses.

Name: Payroll Clearing
Description: Gusto payroll clearing account. Funded prior to each payroll run; zeroed upon disbursement.

Name: Accounts Receivable (Insurance)
Description: Insurance AR - Aetna FL, BCBS FL, Cigna Behavioral, UHC, Medicare Part B claims pending adjudication.

Name: Professional Development
Description: CME/CE credits, conference registrations, Nova adjunct faculty support materials, professional memberships.

Name: Office Supplies
Description: Printer paper, toner, pens, intake folders, patient forms. Vendor: Office Depot.

Name: Staff Salaries
Description: W-2 clinical and admin payroll: Rachel Foster PMHNP (FT), Marcus Hawthorne PMHNP (PT), Danielle Bennett (office mgr). Processed via Gusto.

Name: Malpractice Insurance
Description: HPSO professional liability / malpractice insurance. Annual premium $1,800. Renewed September each year.

Name: Lease Expense
Description: Monthly office lease - 3300 N Federal Hwy Suite 210, Coral Ridge Professional Center, Fort Lauderdale FL 33306. $3,200/mo. Landlord: Coral Ridge Professional Center LLC.

Name: Speaking Honorarium
Description: Revenue from keynote and panel speaking engagements at professional conferences and health system events.

Name: Insurance Reimbursement Income
Description: Clinical revenue from insurance panel remittances - psychiatric evaluation, medication management, psychotherapy CPT codes.

Name: Technology & EHR
Description: SimplePractice EHR subscription ~$149/mo, telehealth platform, Comcast Business internet.

Name: Business Credit Card
Description: Business Amex - SimplePractice, HPSO, online supply purchases, conference registrations. Paid in full monthly from Operating Checking.

Name: Ally Business Savings
Description: Ally high-yield savings reserve account. Quarterly tax set-aside and operating cushion for Bell Behavioral Health.

Name: Estimated Tax Payable
Description: Quarterly federal estimated tax accrual for S-corp pass-through. Managed with Anthony Beaumont CPA.

Name: Owner Distributions
Description: S-corp shareholder distributions to Karen Bell (100% owner). Recorded separately from W-2 reasonable compensation.

Name: Utilities
Description: Office electric and water - 3300 N Federal Hwy Suite 210. Billed monthly.

Name: Office Cleaning
Description: Bi-weekly janitorial service for the suite. Vendor: Coastal Clean Solutions, Fort Lauderdale.

Name: Marketing & Website
Description: bellbehavioralhealth.com hosting, Psychology Today directory listing, printed brochures.

Name: Accounting & Legal
Description: CPA services (Anthony Beaumont, Plantation FL), QuickBooks, S-corp tax preparation and payroll filings.

Name: Bell Clinical Press Sales
Description: Royalty and direct-sale revenue from self-published study guides (CFI Pocket Guide, PMHNP Board Prep, Cultural Competence CME Workbook).
